Prueba3D

library(knitr)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(plot3D)
library(rglwidget)
## The functions in the rglwidget package have been moved to rgl.
library(knitr)
library(rgl)
library(plotrix)
## 
## Attaching package: 'plotrix'
## The following object is masked from 'package:rgl':

R Markdown

Graficos de xyz de loop D

A <- read.table(file="~/Almacen/WORK/AnalisisLoopD/wt/xyz_wt_2/xyzwt_A2.dat")
A$color <- topo.colors(5)[cut(A$Density3D, 5)]
plotA <- plot3d(A$V2, A$V3, A$V4, col = A$color, phi=0, ticktype = "detailed")
rglwidget(elementId = "plot3drgl")

plots
